summary: Separates repository evidence discovery from execution authority, accepts exactly one explicit repository-owned root gate, preserves nested command working directories, and makes remote CI identity project-owned. Upgrades task handoff to a compact normalized 1.2 payload with current-state-verified bounded queries, explicit selector failures, source-bound evidence projections, explicit context for every development mode, stale human-notes detection, project-root path enforcement, bounded error responses, reserved output paths, and serialized rollback-capable paired writes. This is compatible control logic; the v3 control and evidence ledger schemas are unchanged.
